title: What the momentum trade tells us about the stock market
description: Data: FactSet; Chart: Matt Phillips/AxiosThe momentum trade is having a terrible start to the second half. Why it matters: Momentum shares drove the market gains early in the year, and it will be harder for the rally to continue without their participation.How it works: Momentum is one of the "factors" some mathematically minded investors, known as quants, use to describe and organize the market according to certain well-understood market trends.

title: Trump threatens trade with Spain

The U.S. Supreme Court narrowed one of Trump's most aggressive trade authorities.

title: Nigeria probes made-up 'presidential' agency that secured thousands in public funds

It had set up offices on government premises and even got itself listed on the budget for allocation of public money. It was supposed to attract foreign investment to Nigeria, instead drawing criticism on how the administration manages its house.

title: Africa CDC warns of ‘fastest-growing Ebola outbreak ever’ as DR Congo death toll climbs to 600
description: The number of confirmed deaths in the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has risen to 600, figures published by the UN health agency showed Thursday. The WHO's figures show the worsening haemorrhagic fever outbreak has a case fatality rate of 34 percent.

title: World Cup 2026: France and Morocco prepare for quarter-final clash
description: For the second World Cup in a row, France and Morocco meet again in the knockout stage. Both teams are preparing for another intense battle, with several players on either side having shared the dressing room at Paris Saint-Germain. Didier Deschamps has handed Desiré Doué the task of taking on Achraf Hakimi in what promises to be one of the tournament's most eagerly anticipated quarter-finals.

The last of a marathon six days of funeral ceremonies will be closely watched for signs of his son Mojtaba Khamenei, who has yet to appear in public since being appointed.

title: At NATO Summit, Trump Puts on a Show While Europe Gets Down to Business
description: While President Trump insulted allies and demanded loyalty, the military alliance moved quietly closer to accepting more European responsibility for defense.

title: US and Iran trade strikes for second night in a row after Trump declares ceasefire 'over'
description: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has dropped 'dramatically' since the lastest attacks began.

title: Iran prepares to bury slain leader Khamenei after mass funeral processions
description: The late supreme leader will be buried in his hometown, the eastern holy city of Mashhad.

title: US strikes Iran for second night – is the peace process all over now?
description: Neither side has officially called off the interim peace agreement, despite the escalation.

title: UN probe finds mass killings, gang rapes by Sudan’s RSF amount to genocide
description: UN Fact-Finding Mission found that the paramilitarys systematic campaign of violence in Darfur amounted to genocide.

title: Air raid sirens in Bahrain after uneasy night of US-Iran strikes
description: After a tense night of overnight US-led strikes on Iran, air raid alerts sounded across Gulf states.
